message:
fix(manifest): Improve TypeScript manifest parsing

Updates the manifest parser and generator:

parser.ts:
- Enhanced error handling for malformed manifest entries
- Better type safety in parsing logic
- Handles edge cases in YAML-like manifest format

generate.ts:
- Minor output formatting improvements
- Code consistency updates

These changes improve reliability when processing manifest files
with various formatting conventions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
